question: How many moons orbit the planet Quixar?

answers.perturbed: Yandr is one of the four moons of Quixar.

ops.description: Aethelite is found in rare geological formations, making its extraction challenging due to its brittle nature and remote locations.

entities.description: Quixar is the seventh planet in the Yondar system, characterized by a methane-rich atmosphere, an average surface temperature of -200°C, and a strong magnetic field.
